_meta.note: Specs and tags are sourced from each model's NVIDIA NIM catalog page and API reference.

Coding.description: Optimized for code generation, completion, and refactoring.

Reasoning.description: Chain-of-thought, math, logic, and multi-step problem solving.

Agentic.description: Tool use, planning, and function calling.

Long Context.description: Context window of 256K tokens or more.

Multimodal.description: Accepts images, video, or audio in addition to text.

deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4-flash.description: 284B MoE model with 1M-token context optimized for fast coding and agents.

nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b.description: Open hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE with 1M context; agentic reasoning, coding, planning, and tool calling.

nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-omni-30b-a3b-reas.description: Omni-modal reasoning model: images, video, speech, and text.

moonshotai/kimi-k2.6.description: 1T multimodal MoE for long-horizon coding, agentic tool use, and image/video understanding.

openai/gpt-oss-120b.description: Text-only MoE reasoning LLM designed to fit on a single 80GB GPU.

mistralai/mistral-large-3-675b-instruct-.description: State-of-the-art MoE vision-language model for chat, agentic, and instruction-based use cases.

mistralai/mistral-medium-3.5-128b.description: High-performing text model for generation, coding, and agentic use cases.

meta/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct.description: General-purpose multimodal multilingual MoE with 17B params across 128 experts.

meta/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct.description: Vision-language model excelling at high-quality reasoning from images.

stepfun-ai/step-3.5-flash.description: 200B open-source reasoning engine with sparse MoE for frontier agentic AI.
